tokens_scope_fields_check.name: tokens_scope_fields_check
tokens_scope_fields_check.value:
(
        ("ph_core"."tokens"."scope" = 'user'    AND "ph_core"."tokens"."connector_id" IS NULL) OR
        ("ph_core"."tokens"."scope" = 'webhook' AND "ph_core"."tokens"."project_id" IS NOT NULL AND "ph_core"."tokens"."connector_id" IS NOT NULL)
      )

idx_connectors_webhook_path_active.name: idx_connectors_webhook_path_active
idx_connectors_webhook_path_active.where: "ph_assets"."connectors"."webhook_path" IS NOT NULL AND "ph_assets"."connectors"."deleted_at" IS NULL

connectors_type_webhook_check.name: connectors_type_webhook_check
connectors_type_webhook_check.value:
(
        ("ph_assets"."connectors"."type" = 'webhook'   AND "ph_assets"."connectors"."direction" = 'input'  AND "ph_assets"."connectors"."webhook_path" IS NOT NULL) OR
        ("ph_assets"."connectors"."type" = 'webhook'   AND "ph_assets"."connectors"."direction" = 'output' AND "ph_assets"."connectors"."webhook_path" IS NULL)     OR
        ("ph_assets"."connectors"."type" <> 'webhook'  AND "ph_assets"."connectors"."webhook_path" IS NULL)
      )

idx_prompts_default_dataset.name: idx_prompts_default_dataset
idx_prompts_default_dataset.where: "ph_assets"."prompts"."default_dataset_id" IS NOT NULL AND "ph_assets"."prompts"."deleted_at" IS NULL

uniq_release_line_event_legacy_source.name: uniq_release_line_event_legacy_source
uniq_release_line_event_legacy_source.where: "ph_releases"."release_line_events"."legacy_source" IS NOT NULL AND "ph_releases"."release_line_events"."legacy_source_id" IS NOT NULL

release_versions_shape_check.name: release_versions_shape_check
release_versions_shape_check.value:
(
        "ph_releases"."release_versions"."kind" = 'production'
        AND "ph_releases"."release_versions"."production_version_number" IS NOT NULL
        AND "ph_releases"."release_versions"."candidate_number" IS NULL
        AND "ph_releases"."release_versions"."target_production_version_number" = "ph_releases"."release_versions"."production_version_number"
      ) OR (
        "ph_releases"."release_versions"."kind" = 'candidate'
        AND "ph_releases"."release_versions"."production_version_number" IS NULL
        AND "ph_releases"."release_versions"."candidate_number" IS NOT NULL
      )

annotation_tasks_scope_target_consistent.name: annotation_tasks_scope_target_consistent
annotation_tasks_scope_target_consistent.value:
("ph_releases"."annotation_tasks"."scope" = 'canary' AND "ph_releases"."annotation_tasks"."production_release_event_id" IS NULL AND ("ph_releases"."annotation_tasks"."release_version_id" IS NOT NULL OR "ph_releases"."annotation_tasks"."release_line_event_id" IS NOT NULL OR "ph_releases"."annotation_tasks"."canary_id" IS NOT NULL))
        OR ("ph_releases"."annotation_tasks"."scope" = 'online' AND "ph_releases"."annotation_tasks"."canary_id" IS NULL AND ("ph_releases"."annotation_tasks"."release_version_id" IS NOT NULL OR "ph_releases"."annotation_tasks"."release_line_event_id" IS NOT NULL OR "ph_releases"."annotation_tasks"."production_release_event_id" IS NOT NULL))
